title: FileImporter
subtitle: An Importer for local source files.

members.name: importPath
members.description: Performs Lobby doFile(path). Can override to deal with other formats.

members.name: ioFileSuffixes
members.description: A list of valid io source file suffixes.

members.name: tryToImportProtoFromFolder
members.description: Looks for the protoName with the valid ioFileSuffixes and calls importPath if found.
